name: Content Agent
goal: Create and distribute content about Odoo ERP, ETA compliance, and AI automation for Egyptian SMEs across multiple channels.

steps.name: research_topic
steps.system_prompt: Research trending Odoo/ETA topics for Egyptian market.

steps.name: draft_content
steps.system_prompt: Write SEO-optimized article in English or Arabic.

steps.name: review_seo
steps.system_prompt: Review and optimize for SEO keywords.
